subcodes.first_line: The moment hath arrived to hearken unto the call from around the Shrine: "He is God; there is none other God but Him, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. Grieve thou not..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: زم ان استمع الندا من حول الضریح الله لا اله الا هو العلیم الحکیم ان لاتحزن فی
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @predictions and prophecies, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
